Auth.LoginPanel.notes: Beige/cream base with coral primary CTA and secondary metaMe login CTA.

Persona.Picker.notes: List rows with avatar, persona name, privacy badge icon, and optional action menu.

Card.AssetTall.notes: Plush rounded card with hero image, title stack, and badge pills (tiers / price).

Card.OfferBanner.notes: Wide banner with offer headline + partner mark + ValueChip on left.

Toggle.Owned.notes: Discrete toggle for Owned filter; only show when meaningful.

Tabs.Underline.notes: Text tabs with thin coral underline for active state.

Nav.BottomOverlay.notes: Bottom navigation with center mode/hex. In dark mode, uses glass + blur.

Sheet.GlassContainer.notes: Bottom sheet / drawer container with glass translucency.

ValueChip.notes: Display value with primary denom per policy (Q¢ default; $KNYT only inside KNYT offers).
